mapper.select: SELECT pr.id, pr.record_no, pr.qr_code_id, pr.order_item_id, p.id as product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, ps.id as stage_id, ps.stage_name, ps.stage_seq, pr.operator_id, op.real_name as operator_name, pr.scan_time, pr.location, pr.temperature, pr.humidity, pr.photo_url, pr.qc_result, pr.qc_user_id, qu.real_name as qc_user_name, pr.qc_time, pr.qc_remark, pr.remark, pr.created_at FROM production_records pr LEFT JOIN qr_codes qc ON pr.qr_code_id = qc.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON qc.order_item_id = oi.id LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN production_stages ps ON pr.stage_id = ps.id LEFT JOIN sys_user op ON pr.operator_id = op.id LEFT JOIN sys_user qu ON pr.qc_user_id = qu.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC

SELECT pr.id, pr.record_no, pr.qr_code_id, pr.order_item_id, p.id as product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, ps.id as stage_id, ps.stage_name, ps.stage_seq, pr.operator_id, op.real_name as operator_name, pr.scan_time, pr.location, pr.temperature, pr.humidity, pr.photo_url, pr.qc_result, pr.qc_user_id, qu.real_name as qc_user_name, pr.qc_time, pr.qc_remark, pr.remark, pr.created_at FROM production_records pr LEFT JOIN qr_codes qc ON pr.qr_code_id = qc.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON qc.order_item_id = oi.id LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN production_stages ps ON pr.stage_id = ps.id LEFT JOIN sys_user op ON pr.operator_id = op.id LEFT JOIN sys_user qu ON pr.qc_user_id = qu.id WHERE pr.qr_code_id = #{qrCodeId} ORDER BY pr.created_at ASC
